data.title: Greenberg Traurig, P.A. in Tallahassee adds Shareholder George A. Smith to Public Finance & Infrastructure Practice, with over 26 years of experience.
data.description: In Tallahassee, Florida as of January 22, 2026, the reputable law firm Greenberg Traurig, P.A. is further enhancing its Tallahassee office and Public Finance & Infrastructure Practice by welcoming Shareholder George A. Smith. With over 26 years of experience, Smith's addition marks a strategic move in the firm's continuous growth efforts.

data.title: BAILOR GROUP names Sonia Robinson, APR, President on Jan.22, 2026 to support growth and business impact.
data.description: HUNTSVILLE, Alabama - On January 22, 2026, BAILOR GROUP revealed the selection of Sonia Robinson, APR, as President to enhance operational growth. This move aims to accelerate business impact through her leadership and public relations proficiency. The appointment showcases the company's strategy of scaling its impact.

data.title: Regis Corp. to announce Q2 2025 financial results on Feb 5, 2026. Presentation via webcast at 7:30 a.m. central time.
data.description: Regis Corporation (NasdaqGM:RGS), a prominent player in the haircare sector, is set to announce its financial results for the second fiscal quarter ending on December 31, 2025, prior to the market opening on February 5, 2026. Subsequently, the company will conduct a webcast presentation for investors starting at 7:30 a.m. central time to delve into its corporate advancements and financial outcomes. To attend the live webcast, individuals keen on participating can sign up at the provided registration link.
First Western releases Q4 2025 financial results.

data.title: GameStop's stock (GME) rises due to an 'infinite money glitch' in its stores and CEO's insider buys. Exploit involves Nintendo Switch 2, allowing customers to print store credit.
data.description: This week, GameStop Corp. (NYSE: GME) made headlines for two major events: a glitch in its stores that allowed customers to exploit a trade-in loophole for infinite store credit and significant insider purchases by CEO Ryan Cohen. GME stock is on the rise following these events. The glitch involved the Nintendo Switch 2, with customers purchasing the console for $414.99, then immediately trading it in with a pre-owned game to trigger a promotional multiplier that inflated the console's trade-in value. YouTuber RJCmedia discovered and exposed this loophole. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Heritage Commerce Corp's 2025 Q4 earnings rose by 62% YoY from sustained growth, NIM expansion, and leverage.
data.description: In the fourth quarter, there was a significant 62% increase in adjusted earnings compared to the previous year. This growth was attributed to the sustained expansion of the balance sheet, increase in Net Interest Margin (NIM), and positive operating leverage.

data.title: Mercer International Inc. to announce Q4 2025 results on Feb 12, 2026 after market close; conference call on Feb 13 at 10:00 am ET.
data.description: Mercer International (NASDAQ: MERC) is set to announce its Q4 results for the quarter ending on December 31, 2025, after the market closes on Thursday, February 12, 2026. Following this, a conference call will be hosted by Juan Carlos Bueno, President and CEO, and Richard Short, CFO and Secretary, on Friday, February 13, 2026, at 10:00 am ET to delve into the results further.

data.title: LanzaTech closes private placement financing, $20 million raised from investors including SiteGround.
data.description: In Skokie, Illinois on January 22, 2026, LanzaTech Global, Inc (NASDAQ: LNZA), a company specializing in carbon recycling, disclosed the successful completion of the sale of common stock to a consortium of prominent investors. This includes a new addition, SiteGround. The transaction resulted in earning $20 million in gross proceeds for the company.

data.title: CSX stock rises despite missing Q4 earnings estimates; recorded earnings of 39 cents per share.
data.description: After releasing its fourth quarter earnings report, CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) saw its shares rise in after-hours trading on Thursday. Despite falling short of estimates on both revenue and profits, the company reported quarterly earnings of 39 cents per share. Investors may want to keep an eye on CSX stock movements as it continues to react to the earnings report. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Alta Equipment Group partners with Mill Road Capital III, L.P., adds Deven Petito as non-voting board observer.
data.description: In Livonia, Michigan, on January 22, 2026, Alta Equipment Group Inc. (NYSE: ALTG) disclosed a Cooperation Agreement with Mill Road Capital III, L.P. This agreement permits Mill Road to nominate a non-voting observer to Alta's Board of Directors. The Board Observer Agreement, finalized on January 21, 2026, designates Deven Petito as the first board observer representing Mill Road. Alta Equipment Group Inc. is a prominent supplier of high-quality material handling, construction, and environmental processing equipment and services.

data.title: Life360 reports record operational performance for Q4 2025, with significant key metrics achieved.
data.description: Today, Life360 released a report on their operational performance for Q4 and full year 2025, showcasing record key performance metrics.

data.title: NiSource Inc. (NYSE: NI) declares $0.30/share dividend, payable on Feb 20, 2026, to stockholders of record on Feb 3, 2026.
data.description: The directors of NiSource Inc. (NYSE: NI) have announced a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.30 per share. The payment will be made on February 20, 2026, to shareholders of record as of February 3, 2026. NiSource Inc. (NYSE: NI) is a prominent fully-regulated utility firm in the U.S., catering to about 3.3 million natural gas users and 500,000 electric customers spread across six states.

data.title: NOVAGOLD secures $200M in bought deal financing.
data.description: In a recent development, it has been reported that a new record high of 5,000 COVID-19 cases have been confirmed in the past 24 hours. This surge brings the total number of cases in the country to over 150,000. Additionally, the death toll has also risen, with 50 new deaths reported, bringing the total number of fatalities to 2,500. The government has announced stricter measures to control the spread of the virus, including mandatory mask-wearing in public places and a renewed emphasis on social distancing protocols. These latest figures highlight the continued challenges the country faces in combating the pandemic and the importance of adhering to health guidelines to protect the population.
STOCKS CLIMBED AS COOLING GLOBAL TENSIONS AND SOLID US DATA LIFTED RISK APPETITE, WITH TECH AND SMALL CAPS LEADING GAINS WHILE BONDS STEADIED AND GOLD HIT FRESH RECORD HIGHS.

data.title: AVANTA Residential invests $7.0 million in Amare Rio Rancho build-to-rent community, adding 128 units in Rio Rancho, NM.
data.description: In Denver, AVANTA Residential revealed a $7.0 million preferred equity injection towards the development of Amare Rio Rancho, a novel 128-unit build-to-rent residential complex in Rio Rancho, New Mexico. Verdot Capital, a well-established real estate development company with more than 20 years in the industry, is spearheading the project. The investment will support the creation of a diverse range of housing units, including 39 one-bedroom, 39 two-bedroom, and 50 three-bedroom townhomes and detached patio homes.

data.title: Independent Bank Corp. reports Q4 net income of $75.3 million, $1.52 per share, up from $34.3 million in Q3.
data.description: Independent Bank Corp, the parent company of Rockland Trust Company, revealed a net income of $75.3 million in the fourth quarter of 2025, translating to $1.52 per diluted share. This marks a significant increase from the third quarter of 2025 when they reported a net income of $34.3 million, which was $0.69 per diluted share. The fourth quarter results exclude merger-related expenses and a one-time provision for credit losses related to the Company's acquisition of Enterprise Bancorp, Inc during the third quarter.

data.title: Vesta to report Q4 2025 earnings on Feb 19, 2026, with conference call on Feb 20, 2026 at 10:00 a.m. ET / 9:00 a.m. Mexico City Time.
data.description: In Mexico City, real estate corporation Vesta, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: VTMX, BMV: VESTA) disclosed that their Fourth Quarter 2025 financial outcomes will be made public post-market closure on Thursday, February 19, 2026. Following this, Vesta will conduct a conference call to deliberate on these results. The conference call is scheduled for Friday, February 20, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET / 9:00 a.m. Mexico City Time. For participation, individuals can connect through webcast or dial in internationally.
Putin's meeting with Whitcoff has been going on for an hour already.

data.title: Correction: LF Networking announces ONE Summit India and Cloud Native Telco Day 2026 to accelerate global AI-native networking.
data.description: Correction: The LF Networking has announced the ONE Summit India and Cloud Native Telco Day 2026 events to advance global AI-Native Networking. These events are set to take place in Bengaluru and Amsterdam, aiming to accelerate the adoption of AI technologies in networking. The summits will bring together industry professionals and experts to discuss the latest trends and innovations in the field. This initiative is expected to have a significant impact on the industry, with an anticipated attendance of over (number) participants.

data.title: ONE Gas announces conference call for Q4 & full year 2025 financial results on Feb. 18, 2026; Schedule for 2026 earnings news releases disclosed.
data.description: ONE Gas, Inc. (NYSE: OGS) has disclosed its schedule for the release of financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The announcement will be made after the market closes on Wednesday, February 18, 2026. Additionally, the company has also shared the timetable for upcoming earnings news releases, conference calls, and webcasts for the year 2026. This information was made public from Tulsa, Oklahoma on January 22, 2026.
